title: Sweet Potatoes
excerpt: Ingredients 1 kg sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into thick rings 100 g butter 145 ml sugar 100 ml honey 3 cinnamon sticks Method Start with a layer of butter. Then sweet potato. Then butter, honey and sugar. Repeat until everything is used up. Set the plate to fairly high and put the lid on. …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 kg sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into thick rings
  • 100 g butter
  • 145 ml sugar
  • 100 ml honey
  • 3 cinnamon sticks

Method

Start with a layer of butter.

Then sweet potato.

Then butter, honey and sugar.

Repeat until everything is used up.

Set the plate to fairly high and put the lid on.

Now things happen.

Easy!
